import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let haystack = match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    line
  when None
    ""
  end
  let needle = match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    line
  when None
    ""
  end
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  let h_len = string.len(haystack)
  let n_len = string.len(needle)
  if n_len == 0
    print("count=0")
    Ok(())
  else
    while i < h_len
      let sub = string.substring(haystack, i, i + n_len)
      if sub == needle
        count = count + 1
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    print("count=#{count}")
    Ok(())
  end
end
